title: Simple opinion paragraph
subtitle: Make a small opinion stronger.
overview: A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: I think online learning is useful.
It is flexible, but it can feel lonely.
它很灵活，但可能让人感到孤单。
What do you think about online learning?
I think it is useful, but it needs discipline.
我认为它有用，但需要自律。

items.en: I think online learning is useful.
It is flexible, but it can feel lonely.
items.zh: 它很灵活，但可能让人感到孤单。

items.en: What do you think about online learning?
I think it is useful, but it needs discipline.
items.zh: 我认为它有用，但需要自律。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What do you think about online learning?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I think it is useful, but it needs discipline.
lines.zh: 我认为它有用，但需要自律。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: It is flexible, but it can feel lonely.
lines.zh: 它很灵活，但可能让人感到孤单。

items.en: I think online learning is useful.
It is flexible, but it can feel lonely.
items.zh: 它很灵活，但可能让人感到孤单。

items.en: Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
